name: @presence/verifier-sdk
description: Presence verifier SDK for proof verification, sandbox fixtures, and compatibility testing

scripts.check:root-import: npm run build && node -e "const pkg = require('@presence/verifier-sdk'); if (!pkg || typeof pkg.verifyPresence !== 'function') { throw new Error('Root package import did not expose verifyPresence'); } console.log('root import ok');"
scripts.check:sandbox-import: npm run build && node -e "const sandbox = require('@presence/verifier-sdk/sandbox'); if (!sandbox || typeof sandbox.loadPresenceSandboxFixture !== 'function') { throw new Error('Sandbox subpath import did not expose loadPresenceSandboxFixture'); } console.log('sandbox import ok');"
scripts.check:starter: node --check templates/minimal-express-server.cjs && node -e "JSON.parse(require('node:fs').readFileSync('templates/verify-request.example.json', 'utf8')); console.log('starter assets ok');"
scripts.verify:package: npm run build && npm run check:root-import && npm run check:sandbox-import && npm run check:starter && npm run example && npm pack --dry-run
